# Psalms 104

## Verses (35)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Give praise to the Lord, O my soul. O Lord my God, you are very great; you are robed with honour and power. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | You are clothed with light as with a robe; stretching out the heavens like a curtain: | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | The arch of your house is based on the waters; you make the clouds your carriage; you go on the wings of the wind: | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | He makes winds his angels, and flames of fire his servants. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | He has made the earth strong on its bases, so that it may not be moved for ever and ever; | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Covering it with the sea as with a robe: the waters were high over the mountains; | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | At the voice of your word they went in flight; at the sound of your thunder they went away in fear; | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | The mountains came up and the valleys went down into the place which you had made ready for them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | You made a limit over which they might not go, so that the earth would never again be covered by them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | You sent the springs into the valleys; they are flowing between the hills. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | They give drink to every beast of the field; the mountain asses come to them for water. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | The birds of the air have their resting-places by them, and make their song among the branches. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | He sends down rain from his store-houses on the hills: the earth is full of the fruit of his works. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | He makes the grass come up for the cattle, and plants for the use of man; so that bread may come out of the earth; | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | And wine to make glad the heart of man, and oil to make his face shining, and bread giving strength to his heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | The trees of the Lord are full of growth, the cedars of Lebanon of his planting; | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | Where the birds have their resting-places; as for the stork, the tall trees are her house. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | The high hills are a safe place for the mountain goats, and the rocks for the small beasts. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | He made the moon for a sign of the divisions of the year; teaching the sun the time of its going down. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | When you make it dark, it is night, when all the beasts of the woods come quietly out of their secret places. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | The young lions go thundering after their food; searching for their meat from God. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | The sun comes up, and they come together, and go back to their secret places to take their rest. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | Man goes out to his work, and to his business, till the evening. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | O Lord, how great is the number of your works! in wisdom you have made them all; the earth is full of the things you have made. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | There is the great, wide sea, where there are living things, great and small, more than may be numbered. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | There go the ships; there is that great beast, which you have made as a plaything. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | All of them are waiting for you, to give them their food in its time. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | They take what you give them; they are full of the good things which come from your open hand. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | If your face is veiled, they are troubled; when you take away their breath, they come to an end, and go back to the dust. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | If you send out your spirit, they are given life; you make new the face of the earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | Let the glory of the Lord be for ever; let the Lord have joy in his works: | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
| [32](BBE.md#v32) | At whose look the earth is shaking; at whose touch the mountains send out smoke. | [WEB](WEB.md#v32) · [KJV](KJV.md#v32) · [ASV](ASV.md#v32) |
| [33](BBE.md#v33) | I will make songs to the Lord all my life; I will make melody to my God while I have my being. | [WEB](WEB.md#v33) · [KJV](KJV.md#v33) · [ASV](ASV.md#v33) |
| [34](BBE.md#v34) | Let my thoughts be sweet to him: I will be glad in the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v34) · [KJV](KJV.md#v34) · [ASV](ASV.md#v34) |
| [35](BBE.md#v35) | Let sinners be cut off from the earth, and let all evil-doers come to an end. Give praise to the Lord, O my soul. Give praise to the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v35) · [KJV](KJV.md#v35) · [ASV](ASV.md#v35) |
